channel.title: Dugong Field Notes
channel.description: Field notes on workflow automation, AI agents, and the playbooks that run modern teams. From Dugong.

item.title: The sold-out products that sink your collection
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Shopify has no reliable way to push sold-out products to the bottom of a collection, so empty shelves greet your best traffic and drag down the conversion of everything in stock behind them. The native sort breaks across pagination and hiding the product kills its SEO and waitlist. The AI playbook that re-merchandises the storefront the moment stock moves.

item.title: The restock alert that never fires
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Shopify has no real back-in-stock automation, so the customer who clicked notify me never hears the item return and the restock sells out to strangers. The AI playbook that watches real inventory, ranks the waitlist, and notifies in fair order without overselling.

item.title: The chargeback you lose by default
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Shopify auto-submits a thin transaction summary on the deadline, so you lose chargebacks you should win, even with the tracking in hand. The AI playbook that reads the reason code, assembles the evidence, and files the rebuttal before the clock runs out.

item.title: The return that won't approve itself
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Shopify makes you approve every return by hand and won't run a true exchange, so roughly one in five orders comes back as manual work and a refund instead of a swap. The AI playbook that reads the request, applies your policy, runs the exchange, and settles the money.

item.title: The order change that races your warehouse
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: A customer emails to change their Shopify order, and the edit locks the second you fulfil. The AI playbook that processes change requests before the label prints.

item.title: The bad address that ships anyway
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Shopify warns about a bad address, you ship anyway, and the package bounces back. The AI playbook that catches undeliverable addresses before the label prints.

item.title: The high-risk flag that makes you guess
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Shopify's high-risk flag hands you a coin-flip: cancel a real customer or fulfil a fraudster. The AI playbook that decides each flagged order with evidence.

item.title: The overselling problem no one automates
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: Overselling is the top pain for multichannel Shopify merchants. Why manual inventory sync breaks during a sale, and the AI playbook that keeps stock honest.

item.title: The “where is my order?” tickets that eat your afternoon
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: WISMO ('where is my order?') is the most common ecommerce support ticket — ~18% of inbox volume. The AI playbook that answers tracking questions automatically.

item.title: The Shopify automations no one builds
item.dc:creator: Priya Singh
item.description: A field study of 1,374 Shopify playbooks: tagging is 14% of automations, returns under 1%. The gap between what's easy to automate and what's worth automating.

item.title: The death of the drag-and-drop builder
item.dc:creator: Aanya Rao
item.description: For fifteen years, workflow automation looked like a canvas of rectangles connected by lines. After watching three million runs across twelve thousand teams, we're convinced the canvas was always the problem.
